taxonomy: Distichorchis mellicolor is classified under the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family consists of over 30,000 known species and is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants. Distichorchis mellicolor is also classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae. Within the subfamily, Distichorchis mellicolor belongs to the tribe Coelogyneae. The species is further categorized within the tribe based on its unique characteristics and growth patterns.
